ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Company description */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Company size (number of employees) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Company revenue (annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job listing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the job was added */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary for the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (full-time, part-time, internship) */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Experience required for the job */,
  "education_required" TEXT /* Education required for the job */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the job belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the job belongs to */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., job seeker, employer, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "header_image" TEXT /* Header image of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employer receiving the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the message (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_messages_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job rating */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text review for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_ratings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job review */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_reviews_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company follower */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the company */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the company was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_followers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job bookmark */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being bookmarked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user bookmarking the job */,
  "bookmark_date" TEXT /* Date the job was bookmarked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_bookmarks_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
